<!--
Thanks for opening a PR! Please fill out the sections below.
Keep PRs focused — one logical change per PR.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences: what does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature (`feature/*`)
- [ ] Bug fix (`fix/*`)
- [ ] Chore / refactor / docs (`chore/*`)
- [ ] Hotfix (`hotfix/*`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch name follows the convention (`feature/`, `fix/`, `chore/`, `hotfix/`)
- [ ] `make lint` passes locally
- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] `make coverage-check` passes locally (>= 90%)
- [ ] New code paths have tests
- [ ] Public APIs / behavior changes are documented in README or code comments
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits

## Related Issues

<!-- Closes #123, Relates to #456 -->
